name: Gogogo Goblindbergh
name_jp: ゴゴゴゴブリンドバーグ
desc: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 non-Warrior "Gogogo" monster from your hand, Deck, or GY, then if this card is in Attack Position, change it to Defense Position, also for the rest of this turn, you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck, except Xyz Monsters. If this card is detached from an Xyz Monster to activate that monster's effect: You can add 1 "Dododo" monster from your Deck to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Gogogo Goblindbergh" once per turn.
mnst_eff: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 non-Warrior "Gogogo" monster from your hand, Deck, or GY, then if this card is in Attack Position, change it to Defense Position, also for the rest of this turn, you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck, except Xyz Monsters. If this card is detached from an Xyz Monster to activate that monster's effect: You can add 1 "Dododo" monster from your Deck to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Gogogo Goblindbergh" once per turn.
eff: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 non-Warrior "Gogogo" monster from your hand, Deck, or GY, then if this card is in Attack Position, change it to Defense Position, also for the rest of this turn, you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck, except Xyz Monsters. You can only use each effect of "Gogogo Goblindbergh" once per turn.

action: Activates if detached from Xyz Monster to activate its effect
summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
